acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Regression tests cover dirty and unreadable Git state.
Regression tests fail closed unless local and remote HEAD publication can be confirmed.
Redacted full-diff workspace.checkpointed events are critical and immediately flushed.
Per-run exponential backoff with jitter is bounded from 2s to 300s.
A corrupt receipt preserves the complete receipt directory and prevents watermark creation or deletion.
Confirmed receipts compact to per-run watermarks and non-durable legacy telemetry to bounded summaries.
State API distinguishes cached, derived uncached, output and reasoning tokens; a two-agent snapshot measured 94.8% input cache reuse.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Test teardown does not leak OS children
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: The full suite completed without any matching blocked FIFO shell process.

checks.name: make all
checks.summary: 282 tests, 0 failures, 2 skipped; 100% coverage; format, specs, Credo and Dialyzer passed.

checks.name: process leak probe
checks.summary: No symphony-elixir-orchestrator-restart FIFO shell process remained after the complete gate.

residualRisk.risk: Per-session bos-mcp Node memory remains duplicated
residualRisk.mitigation: Tracked by bos-mcp#12; sharing is prohibited until actor and workspace isolation are preserved.

residualRisk.risk: The final aggregation and corrupt-receipt build is not installed while active workers still hold recoverable work
residualRisk.mitigation: The exact branch, PR and CI evidence are durable; installation waits for a safe idle boundary.

summary: Recovery hardening, fail-closed receipt migration, bounded audit storage and cache-aware token telemetry pass local and GitHub checks on the exact PR HEAD.
